title: Iceberg Logical error: 'ChunkInfoRowNumOffset does not exist'
description:
### Describe the bug
Tricky to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
With the [spark.py](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22426375/spark.py) script, run `python spark.py create`. Then, in ClickHouse load the table:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/t0/test/t0', format = 'ORC');
```
Then run spark.py with `python spark.py merge`. Sometimes the merge may trigger more than one match error. If that happens, run again until no errors are thrown. Finally, in ClickHouse run:
```sql
SELECT c0 FROM t0; --Logical error
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'ChunkInfoRowNumOffset does not exist'.
<Fatal> : Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x000000002762bf72
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:128: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x0000000014736d29
2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d23218e
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d231b91
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<>) @ 0x000000000d23e8b6
5. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/PositionDeleteTransform.cpp:228: DB::Iceberg::IcebergStreamingPositionDeleteTransform::transform(DB::Chunk&) @ 0x0000000019ea704b
6. src/Processors/ISimpleTransform.h:33: DB::ISimpleTransform::transform(DB::Chunk&, DB::Chunk&) @ 0x000000001807c4d3
7. src/Processors/ISimpleTransform.cpp:98: DB::ISimpleTransform::work() @ 0x000000001f68ca0a
8. src/Processors/Executors/ExecutionThreadContext.cpp:53: DB::ExecutionThreadContext::executeTask() @ 0x000000001f6ac310
9. src/Processors/Executors/PipelineExecutor.cpp:351: DB::PipelineExecutor::executeStepImpl(unsigned long, DB::IAcquiredSlot*, std::atomic<bool>*) @ 0x000000001f69e0c5
10. src/Processors/Executors/PipelineExecutor.cpp:179: DB::PipelineExecutor::executeStep(std::atomic<bool>*) @ 0x000000001f69dd0e
11. src/Processors/Executors/PullingPipelineExecutor.cpp:59: DB::PullingPipelineExecutor::pull(DB::Chunk&) @ 0x000000001f6b5734
12. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/StorageObjectStorageSource.cpp:286: DB::StorageObjectStorageSource::generate() @ 0x0000000019cdc9f7
13. src/Processors/ISource.cpp:144: DB::ISource::tryGenerate() @ 0x000000001f68ef65
14. src/Processors/ISource.cpp:110: DB::ISource::work() @ 0x000000001f68ec42
15. src/Processors/Executors/ExecutionThreadContext.cpp:53: DB::ExecutionThreadContext::executeTask() @ 0x000000001f6ac310
16. src/Processors/Executors/PipelineExecutor.cpp:351: DB::PipelineExecutor::executeStepImpl(unsigned long, DB::IAcquiredSlot*, std::atomic<bool>*) @ 0x000000001f69e0c5

18. src/Processors/Executors/PipelineExecutor.cpp:565: void std::__function::__policy_invoker<void ()>::__call_impl[abi:se190107]<std::__function::__default_alloc_func<DB::PipelineExecutor::spawnThreads(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAcquiredSlot>)::$_0, void ()>>(std::__function::__policy_storage const*) @ 0x000000001f69f6c3
19. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x000000001487d8d3
20. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:117: ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>::ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<void (ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*)(), ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool*>(void (ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*&&)(), ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool*&&)::'lambda'()::operator()() @ 0x0000000014883fa6
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT UNSIGNED, name VARCHAR(255), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Alice'), (2, 'Bob'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2 (user_id INT UNSIGNED, score DOUBLE, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES t1(id));
SELECT t1.name, t2.score FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.user_id WHERE t1.created_at IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Merge operation triggers logical error in Iceberg table
